canonical_operators.language: pick up the alphabet soup and put it in the basket

operators.name: Place
operators.description: put the alphabet soup in the basket

annotation.description: The robot moves to and grasps the alphabet soup, then lifts it off the living room table.
The robot arm places the alphabet soup into the basket, completing the task.
